purpose: One command queue for Money OS so modules stop acting like separate files.

queue.name: Run MoneyGate truth check
queue.why: All commercial action must pass one gate before outreach, checkout, delivery or revenue reporting.
queue.next_action: read Stripe state, allowed offers, gate flags and next commercial action

queue.name: Fix deploy target
queue.why: Vercel team exists but projects are still empty.
queue.next_action: connect GitHub repo to Vercel project or use Vercel CLI/API path

queue.name: Select storage backend
queue.why: Audit intake endpoint is demo mode only.
queue.next_action: choose Make, Google Sheets, Supabase, or Vercel storage

queue.name: Prepare approved ecosystem outreach
queue.why: Hub71 and Dubai Digital Economy drafts exist but must not be sent without verified route and approval.

queue.name: Find named paid pilot targets
queue.why: Paid pilot is the most direct path to first revenue.
queue.next_action: identify named UAE, Turkey, Greece operators from public business routes

queue.name: Keep product sprawl blocked
queue.why: More products do not solve zero revenue.

rule: MoneyGate checks commercial truth first, then the top unblocked queue item drives new work.
